contents.markdown:
# Video: 00:00.733 => 00:43.233
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:01.360 --> 00:06.640
<Speaker 1>When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

00:07.120 --> 00:13.320
<Speaker 2>To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

00:13.440 --> 00:23.680
<Speaker 1>We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.

00:24.040 --> 00:29.120
<Speaker 3>What we liked about cognitive services offerings were that they had a much higher fidelity.

00:29.600 --> 00:32.880
<Speaker 3>And they sounded a lot more like an actual human voice.

00:33.680 --> 00:37.200
<Speaker 4>Orlando ground 9555 requesting the end of pushback.

00:38.680 --> 00:41.280
<Speaker 4>9555 request to end pushback received.
```

Summary.valueString: The video begins with a Flight Simulator plane flying over an island, transitioning to a discussion about neural TTS technology. A speaker explains the importance of good data for achieving a natural voice, mentioning a universal TTS model built on 3,000 hours of data. Visuals include audio waveform displays and shots of a data center, emphasizing the technology's sophistication. The scene then shifts to scenic aerial views of landscapes and castles, showcasing the visual quality of the simulator. The segment concludes with airport ground operations, including a plane being marshaled and preparing for pushback, accompanied by realistic audio communications.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 3
